case_title: CHANG, TUS MIN et al vs. ROSE, WILFRED DOMINGO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANG, TUS MIN GAO, ALAN AS TO DEFENDANT ROSE, WILFRED DOMINGO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-16-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-17-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-27-1993

CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM EINFELDT, CHRISTIAN J RE: COUNSEL FOR PLTF AND DEFT REQUEST TO CHANGE DATE OF ARB HEARING TO 03-MAY-94 AS THEIR SUITABLE DATE

ATTORNEY ENTERED IN ERROR, PLT. ATTY ENTERED IN ERROR: BAUGHMAN, STEVE WALTER REMOVED, REPLACED BY EINFELDT, CHRISTIAN J AS ATTORNEY FOR CHANG, TUS MIN GAO, ALAN

ADDED TO STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-29-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-04-1994, CASE ORDERED TO ARBITRATION ON FEB-14-1994 PURSUANT TO CCP 1141.11(D) APPEARANCE OF 1-4-94 NOT REQUIRED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
NOTICE OF ARB HEARING ON 5/4/94.
ARBITRATOR UNABLE TO SERVE FROM PHONE CALL; ARB HAD BEEN NOTIFIED.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-16-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. HEARING SET FOR JAN-04-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PHONE CALL FROM PLTF. THAT CASE HAD JUST SETTLED; ARB HAD BEEN NOTIFIED.
ARBITRATOR APPOINTED, STOUT, GREGORY STANSBURY (017319), ARB-5 MAILED
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM LABRIE PAUL D RE: PARTIES HAVE REACHED AMICABLE SETTLEMENT.
CASE REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION CASE DISMISSED.
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ROSE, WILFRED DOMINGO
